skills_tracking.description: AEMT psychomotor skills that must be demonstrated and tracked for course completion and NREMT eligibility.

evaluation_standards.passing: Satisfactory completion per AAOS/NREMT skill sheet criteria
evaluation_standards.remediation: Required after 2 failed attempts before 3rd attempt

skills.name: Trauma Patient Assessment
skills.description: Complete trauma assessment: scene size-up, primary assessment, rapid trauma exam, vitals, secondary assessment, reassessment

skills.name: Medical Patient Assessment
skills.description: Complete medical assessment: scene size-up, primary assessment, SAMPLE/OPQRST history, focused exam, vitals, reassessment

skills.name: OPA Insertion
skills.description: Size and insert oropharyngeal airway on unresponsive patient without gag reflex

skills.name: NPA Insertion
skills.description: Size and insert nasopharyngeal airway with lubrication

skills.name: Bag-Valve-Mask Ventilation
skills.description: Effective BVM ventilation: 1-person and 2-person technique with adequate seal and volume delivery

skills.name: Suctioning
skills.description: Oropharyngeal suctioning with rigid catheter. Correct technique, duration (<15 sec), pre-oxygenation

skills.name: Supraglottic Airway Insertion
skills.description: Size, insert, and confirm placement of supraglottic airway device (King LT or i-gel)

skills.name: Oxygen Administration
skills.description: O2 tank setup, regulator connection, and administration via NC, NRB, and BVM at appropriate flow rates

skills.name: CPAP Application
skills.description: Set up and apply CPAP to patient with respiratory distress. Monitor and adjust.

skills.name: Nebulizer Administration
skills.description: Set up and administer nebulized medication (albuterol). Assembly, loading, flow rate, patient coaching.

skills.name: IV Access (Peripheral Venipuncture)
skills.description: Establish peripheral IV access: tourniquet, site selection, skin prep, catheter insertion, secure, connect admin set, set drip rate
skills.safety_note: Sharps safety briefing required before any practice. 1 instructor per 6-8 students for supervised practice.

skills.name: IV Medication Administration (Push)
skills.description: Administer medication via IV push: verify drug/dose/route, draw medication, connect, push at appropriate rate, flush, document

skills.name: IM Injection (Epinephrine)
skills.description: Draw and administer IM injection. Site selection (vastus lateralis, deltoid), technique, documentation.

skills.name: Intranasal Naloxone Administration
skills.description: Administer naloxone via intranasal route using MAD (mucosal atomization device)

skills.name: IV Drip Rate Calculation and Setting
skills.description: Calculate and set IV drip rate using formula: gtts/min = (Volume × Drop factor) / Time. Both macro and micro drip sets.
equipment_needed: IV admin sets (macro 10 gtts/mL and micro 60 gtts/mL)

skills.name: Supine Backboard Immobilization
skills.description: Log-roll patient onto backboard, secure with straps, apply head immobilization device

skills.name: KED Application
skills.description: Apply Kendrick Extrication Device to seated patient. Torso straps → head straps → leg straps → rotate to backboard.

skills.name: Scoop Stretcher
skills.description: Assemble and apply scoop stretcher to supine patient

skills.name: High-Quality CPR
skills.description: Perform high-quality CPR: correct rate (100-120), depth (2-2.4 in), full recoil, minimal interruptions. 1-rescuer and 2-rescuer.

skills.name: AED Operation
skills.description: Apply AED pads, operate AED, integrate with CPR

skills.name: 12-Lead ECG Placement
skills.description: Correct anatomical placement of 4-lead and 12-lead electrodes (V1-V6 + limb leads)

skills.name: Tourniquet Application (CAT)
skills.description: Apply CAT tourniquet high and tight on extremity hemorrhage

skills.name: Wound Packing
skills.description: Pack junctional and extremity wounds with hemostatic gauze

skills.name: C-Spine Immobilization
skills.description: Manual inline stabilization, C-collar sizing and application, full spinal immobilization

skills.name: Helmet Removal
skills.description: Two-person motorcycle/sports helmet removal with manual C-spine stabilization

skills.name: Splinting (Rigid and Formable)
skills.description: Apply rigid and SAM splints to extremity injuries. Assess PMS before and after.

skills.name: Traction Splint Application
skills.description: Apply traction splint for isolated midshaft femur fracture. Sizing, straps, traction, PMS check.

skills.name: Chest Seal Application
skills.description: Apply vented chest seal for open pneumothorax

skills.name: Normal Delivery
skills.description: Assist with normal cephalic delivery: positioning, coaching, controlled delivery of head, check for nuchal cord, deliver shoulders, clamp/cut cord, deliver placenta, initial neonatal care
equipment_needed: OB kit (clamps, scissors, bulb syringe, towels)

skills.name: Neonatal Resuscitation
skills.description: NRP basics: stimulation, dry, warm, suction, assess HR/respirations, BVM if needed, compressions if HR <60

student_tracking_template.description: Per-student skill tracking. Each skill gets a status and attempt history.
